channel.title: Autopilot on Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Autopilot on Tech Blog

item.title: [Home Lab] AutoPilot Setup for VS Code
item.description: In this post, I’m going to demonstrate the setup of Continue, an open-source autopilot designed for VS Code. Getting Started Once you’ve installed the plugin from the market place, let’s proceed by adding Continue to the right sidebar of VS Code, as recommended. Provider - LM Studio First, on my Windows machine, I’ll execute LM Studio and download Google’s Gemma 2B Instruct model. Provider - OpenAI-compatible Next, let’s configure another LLM in our Home Lab.
